title: acleisanthes obtusa
intro: Acleisanthes obtusa is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the family of plants known as the Lamiaceae or mint family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Acleisanthes obtusa include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Acleisanthes obtusa typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the skin.
